'''yazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valorously|valorously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valorously|valorously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yazate|yazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yazatesher|yazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazatesherĂ«m|yazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazatero|yazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yazateshĂ«|yazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazateshĂ«m|yazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazatero|gokiyazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyazateshĂ«|gokiyazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazateshĂ«m|gokiyazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyazankerom|goyazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyazankeshĂ«|goyazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazankeshĂ«m|goyazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyazankeya|goyazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazaterom|yazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazatemu|yazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yazateya|yazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazaterom|gokiyazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazatemu|gokiyazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyazateya|gokiyazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yazazate|yazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yazazatesher|yazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazazatesherĂ«m|yazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazazatero|yazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yazazateshĂ«|yazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazazateshĂ«m|yazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazazatero|gokiyazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyazazateshĂ«|gokiyazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazazateshĂ«m|gokiyazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyazazankerom|goyazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyazazankeshĂ«|goyazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazazankeshĂ«m|goyazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyazazankeya|goyazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yazazaterom|yazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazazatemu|yazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yazazateya|yazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyazazaterom|gokiyazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazazatemu|gokiyazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyazazateya|gokiyazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠte|yĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠtesher|yĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠtero|yĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠzĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠzĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠterom|yĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠtemu|yĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠteya|yĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠzĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafzafte|yafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafzaftesher|yafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafzaftesherĂ«m|yafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafzaftero|yafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafzafteshĂ«|yafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafzafteshĂ«m|yafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafzaftero|gokiyafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafzafteshĂ«|gokiyafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafzafteshĂ«m|gokiyafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafzafnkerom|goyafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafzafnkeshĂ«|goyafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafzafnkeshĂ«m|goyafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafzafnkeya|goyafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafzafterom|yafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafzaftemu|yafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafzafteya|yafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafzafterom|gokiyafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafzaftemu|gokiyafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafzafteya|gokiyafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
